data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for counting successful referrals.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to count successful referrals, specifically the tracking of unique referral codes or links. However, the evidence provided does not include any information regarding the generation or tracking of these referral codes or links, which is essential for confirming the requirement. The linked use case mentions referral tracking, but without concrete evidence of its implementation, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of unique referral codes or links being generated or tracked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
